title: EasyWarps
description: A convenient and lightweight warp and spawn manager with a fully customizable graphical interface (GUI). Forget about commands!
body:
# EasyWarps: Convenient and Easy Warp Manager

**EasyWarps** — It is a simple and intuitive plug-in for the Spigot/Paper server, designed to manage all warps and spawns through a modern graphical interface (GUI). Forget about long commands — all navigation is now in a few clicks!

## Main Features

`Everything can be configured via config.yml`

**Modern GUI:** Access to all warps and spawns via a user-friendly, fully customizable menu.

**Flexible filtering:** Quickly switch between warp categories directly in the menu:

**Server**

**Public** (created by players)

**My** (Your personal warps)

**Spawns** (All available spawn points)

**Lots of Spawns:** Set and use multiple spawn points (_/setspawn 1_, _/setspawn 2_) with the possibility of random teleportation.

**Safety:** Built-in location check before teleportation to prevent players from getting stuck in blocks.

**Improving Teams:** Support for Auto-completion (Tab Completer) for all commands, making their use as fast and convenient as possible.

## Warp materials design

`Materials can be configured via config.yml`

![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7ecac35c7b57ddda6dee68c194386ed30fa1b5a5.png)

**Default public warp material:** Compass

**Default server warp material:** Book

**Default spawn material:** BEACON

**Default warp material by name:** 

  `shop: Emerald`
  
  `mine: Diamond Pickaxe`
  
  `pvp: Diamond Sword`
  
  `home: Wooden door`
  
## Commands and Rights

`All rights can be set via plugin.yml`

**Resources can be downloaded on [GitHub](https://github.com/Lostor-dev/EasyWarps)**

`/warps [filter]`	Opens the GUI.	**easywarps.warps**

`/warp <name>`Teleports to the warp.	**easywarps.warp**

`/setwarp <name>`	Install a new warp. **easywarps.setwarp**

`/delwarp <name>`	Remove the warp.	**easywarps.delwarp**

`/spawn [number]`Teleports to spawn.	**easywarps.spawn**

`/setspawn [number]` Sets a spawn with a number (optional). **easywarps.setspawn**

`/delspawn [number]` Deletes the spawn with the number (optional). **easywarps.delspawn**

## Compatibility

**Platform:** Spigot, Paper (or forks based on the Spigot API).

**Minecraft Versions:** 1.16.5 - 1.20 .x and higher. **(recommended 1.18+)**

## Note from the developer

**Hello! My name is Lostor, and I am a novice Java developer. This plugin is my first major project. I tried to make it as clean, stable, and useful as possible. I will be glad to hear your feedback and to report any bugs I find! Your support will help me develop as a programmer.**
